body.title: Hierarchical timing tiers for push sources: fast (2s) / medium (30s) / slow (5min)
body.result: Added TIMING_TIER class attribute to BasePushSource ('fast'/'medium'/'slow'). Assigned tiers: fast=InteroceptionSource/MilieuSource/InboxWatcher; slow=HeartbeatSource/HabitCandidateSource/CuriositySource/BoredomSource/SelfTestSource/ConsolidationReplay; medium=all others. run_background_sources() now gates entire tier groups by wall-clock (2s/30s/300s) — sources only called when their tier interval has elapsed. All 1684 tests pass.
body.description: All push sources run at flat intervals with no phase alignment. Biological cortex-BG loops run at theta/beta/gamma frequencies. Fix: implement 3 timing tiers in run_background_sources(): fast (2s — interoception, milieu tick), medium (30s — NE consolidation, memory surfacing), slow (5min — strategic review, boredom check). Sources declare their tier via class attribute; run_background_sources() dispatches per tier. Neuro finding from deep-audit Panel 3.
